title: rubus idaeus var. yabei
intro: Rubus idaeus var. yabei, also known as the Japanese raspberry or yabei raspberry, is a variety of the red raspberry plant native to Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus var. yabei include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, allowing it to be consumed as a tea, capsule, or added to food products.
